steps.title: Substitute the given input
steps.content:
Replace $x$ with the input value in the function:
$$f(1/3)=6(1/3-1/3)^2+7/3$$

steps.title: Simplify the expression
steps.content:
The quantity inside the square is $0$, so the first term becomes $0$.
$$f(1/3)=6(0)^2+7/3=7/3$$
The answer is 7/3.
